content:
# Environmental Risk Assessment

**Summary**: The evaluation of potential environmental hazards and the development of mitigation strategies.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] conducted an environmental risk assessment for oil spills in the Western Arabian Gulf.

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] performed environmental risk assessment on oil-related pollutants in marine environments.

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] conducted an environmental risk assessment regarding heavy metal contamination in soil near dumpsites.

- [[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024]] performed environmental risk assessments for heavy metals and particulate matter.

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] evaluated environmental risk assessment for industrial air pollution in Saudi Arabia.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] ['shoreline type analysis', 'biotope mapping', 'spatial data integration']

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] performed environmental risk assessment on oil-related pollutants in marine environments.

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] conducted an environmental risk assessment regarding heavy metal contamination in soil near dumpsites.

- [[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024]] performed environmental risk assessments for heavy metals and particulate matter.

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] evaluated environmental risk assessment for industrial air pollution in Saudi Arabia.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] ['GIS analysis', 'remote sensing']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified specific high-priority zones (Safaniyah, Khursaniyah-Jubail, Tarut Bay) requiring immediate protection during spill events. ([[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016, p. 14]])

- Determined LC50 values for local fish species to assess the impact of crude oil and drilling mud. ([[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018, p. 70]])

- Heavy metals like Cr were found to pose hazardous cancer risks in some studied areas. ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022, p. 25]])

- Non-carcinogenic hazards were below acceptable bounds, but children showed higher carcinogenic risks. ([[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024, p. 19]])

- Switching fuel to natural gas resulted in significant reductions in SO2 (97.2%) and NO2 (46.9%). ([[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025, p. 12]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] Difficulty of oil spill mitigation in coastal areas where oil sticks to habitats like mangroves or salt marshes.
